project_description: Build a string utilities library in Python. The library needs five functions, each in its own module file with type hints and docstrings: (1) a function to reverse a string, (2) a function to check if a string is a palindrome, (3) a function to count the number of words in a string, (4) a function to count vowels in a string, and (5) a function to convert a string to title case. Each function is self-contained and operates only on its input string with no shared state or helpers between them.
